hero.question: Will Arizona win the 2026 NCAA Tournament?
hero.prob_take: At 33.7%, the market is pricing Arizona as the 4th or 5th most likely champion, which feels about right for a program with tournament pedigree but real depth questions in the backcourt. The sharp move is watching whether their guard play solidifies by March, because if it does, 33.7% undershoots a team capable of a Sweet 16 run that turns into a championship narrative.

daily_take.headline: Arizona's March Magic Looks Cheap at 34%, Here's Why Smart Money Is Buying
daily_take.deck: Arizona just popped 2.2 points to 33.7% after a strong nonconference run, but the market is still pricing in too much doom. The Wildcats have the talent, the coach, and the conference pedigree to make a Final Four run. Sharp bettors should be loading up before March when the smart money floods in and this number moves closer to 40%.
